title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.

title: SubliminalCoding/poolrun
summary: Ollama for one-GPU-pool boxes: unified-memory-safe admission control + single-resident hot-swap for local LLM serving on DGX Spark / GB10 / Jetson.

title: amineeng/scraping-browser
summary: 🔍 Automate dynamic web scraping with Scraping Browser, a full-host solution using Puppeteer, Selenium, and Playwright for seamless data collection.

title: ColinGPT9/clips-studio
summary: Local-first AI clipping studio - turn long videos into ready-to-post vertical Shorts entirely on your own PC. Multimodal clip detection, speaker-aware face tracking, editable captions, AI edit chat. No cloud AI, no fees.

title: ai-action/code-ollama
summary: 🦙 Ollama coding agent that runs in your terminal.

title: Kcao3034/markdown-editor-mcp-server
summary: 📝 Enhance your Markdown workflow with this MCP server, designed for structured editing and full compliance with MCP 2025 standards.

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

title: isma9127/query-genie
summary: 🧞 Transform natural language into actionable insights with QueryGenie, a robust AI platform for intelligent database interaction and real-world deployment.

title: AhmadAli33297/virtual
summary: 🚀 Rebase your Fedora installations effortlessly with "virtual," leveraging the latest atomic builds for a secure and smooth experience.

title: Manuelgr928/rusty-beaker
summary: ⚡ RustyClaw 2026 — AI CLI for RAG Agents, Voice Cloning & Browser Automation

title: haseeb-321/devflow-ai
summary: 🚀 Generate SEO-optimized technical articles from GitHub repositories effortlessly with DevFlow AI. Enhance your content quickly and effectively.

title: haritha8503/langextract
summary: 🌐 Extract languages from text seamlessly using LangExtract. Simplify language detection and enhance your projects with ease and accuracy.

title: Alakaroud/vuln-structure
summary: 🔍 Extract and structure security vulnerability data from unstructured text with ease using the lightweight Python package, vuln-structure.

title: nishantsunuwar/MoCE
summary: 🌟 Implement Mixture-of-Clustered-Experts (MoCE) to improve expert specialization and generalization in instruction tuning with advanced routing mechanisms.

title: Alex663028/pulse-agent
summary: Pulse — Hermes-style self-improving AI agent. Reliability-first rebuild with evaluated skill self-evolution, multi-agent team orchestration, dialectic user modeling, and fully self-hosted default stack (Ollama + SQLite FTS5). Apache 2.0 license.

title: judy-kyalo/llm-structured-summary
summary: 📝 Summarize text using LLMs to generate structured insights from research titles or abstracts, making data easy to understand and reuse.

title: kacchanff/agent-playground
summary: 🛠️ Experiment with AI agents in a local sandbox to run, score, and compare outputs without the need for complex frameworks.

title: XAIHT/Tlamatini
summary: Tlamatini is a self-hosted AI developer assistant for local or cloud LLMs: hybrid RAG over your codebase, a 79-tool multi-turn engine, a 74-agent visual workflow designer, and ACPX, a runtime for external coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor and Gemini CLI.

title: richie-rich90454/training-generator
summary: Training Generator is a cross-platform desktop app built with Electron and Node.js that converts documents (PDF, DOCX, DOC, RTF, TXT, MD, HTML) into structured AI training data. Using local Ollama models, it extracts instructions, Q&A pairs, and conversation data for machine learning, AI fine-tuning, and NLP workflows, while keeping all processing.
